subject: Are you with me against Trump?

body:
this is going to take all of us | Friend --

I am not afraid of Donald Trump. He can attack me as much as he wants -- I know I can take it. But we won't let his attacks against Americans based on their ethnicity, their gender, or the faith they practice go unanswered.

**[We can take Trump on and win, but I need you in this fight. Can I count on you to step up today? When you make your first donation, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you.](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/contribute/donate/give-now/?zip=20112&isd=No&/)

** In the United States, we ask our presidents to show the world what it means to be American. In Barack Obama, we've had a president who has shown us at our very best, whether he's learning from the kids at the White House science fair or making passionate arguments to foreign leaders about American ideals like freedom and equality.

I can't exactly see Donald Trump doing any of those things -- can you?

It’s going to take all of us working together to stop him. As he raises millions from the Republicans’ wealthiest donors, we’re going to build this campaign the right way: by assembling a strong grassroots team to take him on and say we are a better country than this -- including you.

name: Rob Portman
subject: please help us fight back
body:
| Peter --

**Yesterday, Senator Harry Reid's SuperPAC reserved $9.5 million in TV ads for the fall.** Over the past month, they have spent nearly $2 million attacking me on TV across Ohio, and earlier this year, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee reserved an additional $10 million in airtime to blanket Ohio with misleading attack ads.
**We need your help.** We're taking our fight to the grassroots. Since May of last year, we've contacted nearly 2 million targeted swing voters through our unprecedented door and phone programs. Several articles this week detailed our ground game. ABC in Columbus touted our "secret weapon" while the _Dayton Daily News_ and the _Akron Beacon Journal_ highlighted our impressive interns and volunteers. [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fgrassroots_fund%3Fcampaign_id%3D82b40a022cff2a75f12f80b3dbdd7bde%26email%3DPeter&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gr_fund_1&n=1) To be successful in November, we need to fight the false attacks from National Democrats and take our message straight to Ohio voters. **Will you help us fund our grassroots effort?** [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fgrassroots_fund%3Fcampaign_id%3D82b40a022cff2a75f12f80b3dbdd7bde%26email%3DPeter%26amount%3D25&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gr_fund_1&n=2)

clean_body: | Peter -- Yesterday, Senator Harry Reid's SuperPAC reserved $9.5 million in TV ads for the fall. Over the past month, they have spent nearly $2 million attacking me on TV across Ohio, and earlier this year, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee reserved an additional $10 million in airtime to blanket Ohio with misleading attack ads. We need your help. We're taking our fight to the grassroots. Since May of last year, we've contacted nearly 2 million targeted swing voters through our unprecedented door and phone programs. Several articles this week detailed our ground game. ABC in Columbus touted our "secret weapon" while the Dayton Daily News and the Akron Beacon Journal highlighted our impressive interns and volunteers. To be successful in November, we need to fight the false attacks from National Democrats and take our message straight to Ohio voters. Will you help us fund our grassroots effort? This race presents Ohio voters with a clear choice between moving forward with my pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government. ! All best, Rob "Donate Here!" -=-=-

Contact: Brittney Wilson
802-274-2722
**_Phil Scott's 'Green Flag' Tour Roars into Bennington and Rutland Counties_**
Montpelier, VT - Phil Scott's statewide Green Flag tour roars into Bennington and Rutland counties Thursday and Friday.

Scott is touring all across Vermont to discuss his plan to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and make sure the state budget does not grow faster than Vermont’s economy or Vermonters’ income. The tour also features 'Blizzard' a small passenger bus, frequently piloted by the candidate, that has been converted into a mobile campaign office.

Stay tuned next week as Phil continues his “Green Flag Tour” around Vermont. For more information, contact [Brittney@PhilScott.org](mailto:brittney@philscott.org).

Thursday, May 19th Bennington County

11:30 a.m. Meet and Greet, R.K. Miles Lumber

1:30 p.m. Downtown Manchester Business Tour

4:00 p.m. Vermont Fuel Dealers Annual Meeting

Friday, May 20th Rutland County

8:30 a.m. WSYB Radio, 1380 AM

12:00 p.m. Meet and Greet, Cassella’s

2:00 p.m. Rutland Herald

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Hundreds of thousands of potential votes for Bernie
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
After a convincing victory in Oregon and virtual tie in Kentucky on Tuesday, our campaign now pivots to California - where a whopping **475 pledged delegates** will be at stake in the June 7th election.
**We have a great opportunity in California, but we have to act fast.** Hundreds of thousands of Californians want to vote for our progressive agenda and a candidate who can defeat Donald Trump handily. But to vote for Bernie, these Californians **must** be registered as a Democrat (or "no party preference," and request a Democratic ballot) no later than this Monday, May 23rd.
**That's where we come in!** Fortunately, California offers online voter registration, so we're calling targeted voters in California this weekend to remind them of the opportunity to re-register and vote for Bernie. If everyone who supports Bernie puts in just an hour or two to call Californians, we'll have a yuuuge impact. **Will you help out?**
**[Yes, I'll help Bernie win California by calling to register voters](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160519a "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160519a")**
If you've never called voters for Bernie before, don't worry. It's pretty easy. You just need a computer or a tablet, and a phone. We provide a simple script for you to follow, and there are helpful volunteers standing by on livechat to assist if you need. You can call on your own from home, or **[attend a phonebank party near you with other Bernie supporters.](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=phonebank "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=phonebank")**
**We're staying in this fight because each and every vote cast for our campaign sends a strong message to the political establishment that we will not continue to accept the status quo of a corrupt political system that holds in place a rigged economy.** Every state we win and vote we earn strengthens our hand in delivering that message at the convention in Philadelphia.
So we hope you'll continue fighting with us and keep this political revolution rolling strong.
**[Sign up to call some California voters this weekend.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160519b "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160519b")**
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
P.S. If you'd like to hear directly from our organizing staff about this California project and our goals for the rest of the campaign, please **[join us on a special livestream event tonight](http://bernie.to/volstream "http://bernie.to/volstream")** (Thursday) at 8 pm ET/5 pm PT.

**[I can't volunteer, but I'll contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160519-call-CA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160519-call-CA")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
